details: The agent correctly identified the failing container as 'log-shipper' and retrieved the exact error message 'ERROR: cannot resolve log-collector.logging.svc' from its logs. The agent ran actual kubectl commands against the cluster, inspected the pod view to identify which container was in CrashLoopBackOff, and then fetched logs from the correct container using -c log-shipper. The web container was correctly identified as healthy.
